name: Gladiator's Finale
title: Unbound Dream: Gladiator's Finale
desc: "The gladiator's healing wounds were covered with invisible feathers.\nHe eventually set off on a journey, finally as free as a bird. His destination was the place where flowers bloom and birds soar."
in_play_description:
The character to which this is attached deals +1 Physical DMG.
When the character to which this is attached is your only character still not defeated: Their Normal Attack costs 1 fewer Unaligned Element and deals +1 DMG. (Twice per Round)
